title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v MUKANDAMAGE
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v MUKANDAMAGE
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE - RPAA 00538/2025/CA (Gakwaya, P.J.) 30 Ukuboza
2025]
Amategeko agenga imiburanishirize y’imanza nshinjabyaha – Inyito y’icyaha – Inkiko ziburanisha
ibikorwa bigize icyaha, ntiziburanisha inyito y’icyaha yemejwe n’Ubushinjacyaha cyangwa
n’Inkiko zabanje, bivuze ko Inkiko zifite inshingano yo guha ibikorwa bigize icyaha inyito ikwiye
iteganywa n’amategeko, ko ntizitegetswe gukurikiza inyito y’icyaha yatanzwe n’Ubushinjacyaha.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Mukandamage mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Ngoma icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nyuma yuko afashwe
na police afite udupfunyika dutatu (3) tw’urumogi yari asigaranye kurwo yari arimo gucuruza,
avuga ko ari urwo yari yazaniwe n’umuhungu we. Urwo Rukiko rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko
ahamwa no kubika no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, rumuhanisha
igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’icyenda (19) n’amezi atandatu (6), ko ariko rurebye
imibereho ye rubona ntaho yakura ihazabu.
Mukandamage yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana asaba kugabanyirizwa
igihano kuko yaburanye yemera icyaha, kandi akaba ari ubwa mbere akurikiranywe mu Nkiko.
Urwo Rukiko narwo rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha zikwiye
gutuma Mukandamage yongera kugabanyirizwa igihano, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo
cy’imyaka 15, ko kandi igihano cy’ihazabu atagihawe kuko no mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye atagihawe
kandi Ubushinjacyaha bukaba butarabijuririye.
Mukandamage yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko anenga Urukiko Rukuru kuba
yararusabye kumugabanyiriza igihano kuko yaburanye yemera icyaha agisabira imbabazi kuva mu
ntangiriro, ariko rukaba rwaramuhanishije igihano kirekire cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu
(15), kandi yarafatanywe udupfunyika dutatu (3) tw’urumogi twonyine, bari bamurangiyemo
umuti w’inzoka, ko atarucuruzaga.
Ubushinjacyaha bwo buvuga ko ibisabwa na Mukandamage byo guhindurirwa inyito y’icyaha
kuko ngo yemera icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi, agasaba no kugabanyirizwa igihano, nta shingiro
bifite kuko kuva iperereza ritangiye, ndetse no mu kuburana urubanza mu Rukiko Rukuru yemeye
icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi, ko rero impamvu agaragaza mu bujurire atarizo zaburanyweho,
bityo ko ubujurire bwe nta shingiro bwahabwa.
Incamake y’icyemezo: Inkiko ziburanisha ibikorwa bigize icyaha, ntiziburanisha inyito y’icyaha
yemejwe n’Ubushinjacyaha cyangwa n’Inkiko zabanje, bivuze ko Inkiko zifite inshingano yo guha
ibikorwa bigize icyaha inyito ikwiye iteganywa n’amategeko, ko ntizitegetswe gukurikiza inyito
y’icyaha yatanzwe n’Ubushinjacyaha.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
Ubushinjacyaha vs Nsabimana alias Sankara n’Abandi, RPA 00060/2021/CA rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 4/4/2022.

Ubushinjacyaha vs Habanabakize, RPAA 00241/2022/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 30/11/2022.
Inyandiko z’abahanga:
Général Likulia Bolongo, Droit pénal spécial zaïrois, Tome I, 2e édition, L.G.D.J., Paris, 1985,
P.20.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Ku wa 21/2/2022, Mukandamage Immaculée yafashwe na police afite udupfunyika dutatu
(3) tw’urumogi yari asigaranye kurwo yari arimo gucuruza, avuga ko ari urwo yari yazaniwe
n’umuhungu we witwa Munyentwari François ari udupfunyika dutandatu (6).
[2] Iperereza rirangiye, Ubushinjacyaha bwareze Mukandamage Immaculée mu Rukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Ngoma icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi,
busaba ko cyamuhama agahanishwa igihano cy’igifungo cya burundu n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u
Rwanda miliyoni mirongo itatu (30.000.000 Frw).
[3] Mukandamage Immaculée yaburanye yemera icyaha, avuga ko yari amaze icyumweru
acuruza urumogi yari yazaniwe n’umuhungu we ari udupfunyika dutandatu (6) ngo arugurishe
k’uwitwa Rasta kamwe kamwe kuri 250 Frw, akuremo amafaranga yo kugura umunyu no
kwishyura abahinzi, asaba imbabazi avuga ko yabitewe n’ubukene.
[4] Mu rubanza no RP 00265/2022/TGI/NGOMA rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Ngoma ku wa 31/3/2022, rushingiye ku kwemera icyaha kwa Mukandamage Immaculée no ku
buhamya bwa Uwingabire Veneranda umushinja, rwemeje ko ahamwa no kubika no gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi
n’icyenda (19) n’amezi atandatu (6), ko ariko rurebye imibereho ye rubona ntaho yakura ihazabu.
[5] Mukandamage Immaculée yajuririye Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana asaba
kugabanyirizwa igihano kuko yaburanye yemera icyaha, kandi akaba ari ubwa mbere
akurikiranywe mu Nkiko.
[6] Mu rubanza no RPA 00619/2022/HC/RWG, rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa
Rwamagana ku wa 15/5/2025, rushingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa
30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, nk’uko yahinduwe n’iya 21 (a) y’Itegeko nº
059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023, kuba kuva mu ntangiriro yaraburanye yemera icyaha cyo gucuruza
urumogi ku buryo budashidikanywaho no kuba ari ubwa mbere akurikiranywe mu Nkiko, rwemeje
ko ari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha zikwiye gutuma Mukandamage Immaculée yongera
kugabanyirizwa igihano, rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 15, ko ariko igihano cy’ihazabu
1 Iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, naho ihazabu ikaba ishobora kugabanywa kugeza
kuri ¼ y’ihazabu ntoya iteganywa n’itegeko”

atagihawe kuko no mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye atagihawe kandi Ubushinjacyaha bukaba
butarabijuririye.
[7] Ku wa 23/5/2025, Mukandamage Immaculée yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko
anenga Urukiko Rukuru kuba yararusabye kumugabanyiriza igihano kuko yaburanye yemera
icyaha agisabira imbabazi kuva mu ntangiriro, ariko rukaba rwaramuhanishije igihano kirekire
cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), kandi yarafatanywe udupfunyika dutatu (3) tw’urumogi
twonyine, bari bamurangiyemo umuti w’inzoka, ko atarucuruzaga ko ndetse nta n’ikibigaragaza
kuko nta n’umuhungu agira urumuzanira, nta n’umuntu bagaragaje yarugurishijeho, akaba asaba
uru Rukiko kumuhindurira inyito y’icyaha, agahamwa n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi.
Yongeraho ko yasabye gusubikirwa igihano akaba atarabihawe kandi ashaje, ndetse akaba afite
abana babiri (2) b’imfubyi yareraga yasize mu rugo bonyine.
[8] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko ibisabwa na Mukandamage Immaculée byo guhindurirwa
inyito y’icyaha kuko ngo yemera icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi, agasaba no kugabanyirizwa
igihano, nta shingiro bifite kuko kuva iperereza ritangiye, ndetse no mu kuburana urubanza mu
Rukiko Rukuru yemeye icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi, ndetse hari n’umutangabuhamya
umushinja, ko rero impamvu agaragaza mu bujurire atarizo zaburanyweho, bityo ko ubujurire bwe
nta shingiro bwahabwa.
[9] Urubanza rwahawe no RPAA 00538/2025/CA, ruburanishwa ku wa 16/12/2025,
Mukandamage Immaculée yunganiwe na Me Byiringiro Kalisa.
[10] Harebwe imyanzuro n’imiburanire y’ababuranyi, ikibazo kizasuzumwa muri uru rubanza
ni ukumenya niba inyito y’icyaha Mukandamage Immaculée yahamijwe ikwiye guhinduka,
agahamwa n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi no kumenya niba harakozwe amakosa yo
kutamusubikira igihano kandi ashaje no ku mpamvu z’uko yasize abana birera mu rugo.
II. IBIBAZO BIGIZE URUBANZA N’ISESENGURWA RYABYO
Kumenya niba inyito y’icyaha Mukandamage Immaculée yahamijwe ikwiye
guhinduka agahamwa n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi
[11] Mukandamage Immaculée na Me Byiringiro Kalisa umwunganira, bavuga ko yaburanye
yemera ko yafatanywe udupfunyika dutatu (3) tw’urumogi rwo kwinywera yivura mu nda kuko
yari arwaye, ko atarucuruzaga kuko n’abaje kumusaka bagiye mu nzu ye bagashakamo urundi
bakarubura, ko rero ibyo bigaragara ko iperereza ryakozwe ridahagije kuko nta muntu waba
yarabajijwe ngo yemeze ko asanzwe azi ko arucuruza, ko ahubwo ibimenyetso byashingiweho
ahamwa no kurucuruza bishidikanywaho n’ingano y’urwo yafatanywe ikaba ari ntoya cyane nabyo
bigaragaza ko nta mugambi wo kurucuruza yari afite, basaba ko yahamwa no gufatanwa urumogi
yari agamije kurunywa kandi akagabanyirizwa igihano.
[12] Me Byiringiro Kalisa akomeza avuga ko Mukandamage Immaculée yari akwiye
kugabanyirizwa igihano ku buryo buhagije, hashingiwe ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha
yagaragazaga, ko ndetse kuba yarakomeje kugaragaza ko yumva uburemere bw’icyaha yakoze
akakicuza abikuye ku mutima, nta cyari kubuza ko yongera kugabanyirizwa igihano ku buryo

buhagije; ko rero ashingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko no 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 nk’uko
ryahinduwe n’Itegeko no 59/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange,
mu ngingo yaryo ya 2, iteganya ko iyo hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha igihano gishobora
kugabanywa kugera kuri ½ cy’igihano gito giteganyirijwe icyaha, uru Rukiko rwamuha amahirwe
akongera kugabanyirizwa igihano, kuko nta n’ingaruka zikomeye icyaha yakoze cyateje. Asoza
avuga ko mbere na mbere basaba ko inyito y’icyaha yahinduka agahamwa no gufatanwa no
kunywa urumogi, rwabibona ukundi, hakemezwa ko urubanza yajuririye ruhindutse ku birebana
n’igihano.
[13] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko Mukandamage Immaculée yafashwe akekwaho gucuruza
urumogi biturutse ku makuru Abayobozi bari bahawe y’uko arucuruza, ndetse ubwe mu iperereza
no mu Nkiko kugeza aburana urubanza ajuririra yemeraga ko yacuruzaga urumogi aruzaniwe
n’umuhungu we ngo akuremo amafaranga y’umunyu n’ay’abahinzi, ko ibyo avuga muri uru
Rukiko asaba guhindurirwa inyito y’icyaha ari ubwa mbere abivuze, kandi ko kuba umuburanyi
yahindura imvugo igihe aburana urubanza mu mizi, bidatesha agaciro ukwemera icyaha kwe,
hashingiwe ku murongo2 wafashwe mu manza zitandukanye uvuga ko guhakana icyaha
umuburanyi yemeye mu iperereza ubwabyo bidatesha ukwemera kwe agaciro, kuko Umucamanza
afite ububasha bwo gusuzumana ubushishozi no guha agaciro izo mvugo z’uregwa wemeye icyaha
harebwe ibikorwa aregwa, igihe asanga uko kwemera kudashidikanywaho akabiha agaciro
ashingiye ku mutimanama we (intime conviction), ko rero basaba uru Rukiko kwemeza ko
urubanza rujuririrwa rugumana agaciro karwo.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[14] Impaka muri uru rubanza zishingiye ku kumenya niba inyito y’icyaha cyo gucuruza
urumogi Mukandamage Immaculée yahamijwe yahinduka, agahamwa no kurufatanwa agamije
kurwinywera kuko aribyo yemera nk’uko bigaragazwa n’ingano ntoya y’udupfunyika 3 twarwo
yasanganywe.
[15] Nk’uko byemejwe mu rubanza no RPAA 00241/2022/CA3 rwaciwe n’Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/11/2022, ihame ry’amategeko nshinjabyaha ryemeza ko Inkiko ziburanisha
ibikorwa bigize icyaha, zitaburanisha inyito y’icyaha yemejwe n’Ubushinjacyaha cyangwa
n’Inkiko zabanje, ibi bivuze ko Inkiko zifite inshingano yo guha ibikorwa bigize icyaha inyito
ikwiye iteganya n’amategeko, ko zidategetswe gukurikiza inyito y’icyaha yatanzwe
n’Ubushinjacyaha, bisobanura na none ko inyito y’icyaha ishobora guhinduka igihe cyose Urukiko
rutarafata icyemezo ndakuka4.
2 urubanza no. RPAA 00480/2023/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 26/2/2025 haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Twizeymana Jean de Dieu (igika cya 18).
3 Reba urubanza no RPAA 00241/2022/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 30/11/2022, haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Habanabakize Sulaiman.
4 ‘’Aussi longtemps que la décision judiciaire n’est pas encore devenue irrévocable, toute qualification est susceptible
de modification. En effet, le parquet n’est pas lié par la qualification retenue par l’officier de police judiciaire ou par
la partie lésée dans sa plainte. De même la juridiction de jugement étant saisie de faits, elle peut souverainement
modifier la qualification qui lui est proposée par l’officier du ministère public ou par la partie civile en cas de citation
directe’’, Général Likulia Bolongo, Droit pénal spécial zaïrois, Tome I, 2e édition, L.G.D.J., Paris, 1985, P.20.

[16] Nk’uko bigaragara mu gace ka 2, aka 7 n’aka 11 tw’urubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru
rwagaragaje ko ku rwego rwa mbere, Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Ngoma rwahamije Mukandamage
Immaculée icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi rushingiye ku kuba yarabyemeye mu iperereza, ku
mvugo z’umutangabuhamya Uwingabire Veneranda wemeje ko yari ahari igihe abapolisi hamwe
n’umuntu wari uje kugura urumogi, bamufatanaga udupfunyika 3 twarwo no kuba hari
inyandikomvugo irufatira uregwa yashyizeho umukono. Rwasobanuye ko mu myanzuro ye yo
kujurira yagaragaje ko nta kindi anenga urubanza uretse gusaba kugabanyirizwa igihano, ko kandi
yanireguye avuga ko kuba yaracuruje urumogi bitari akamenyero, ahubwo yabitewe n’ubukene no
kuba yarashakagamo amafaranga yo kugura umunyu n’ayo kwishyura abahinzi, asaba imbabazi
ko atazongera kurucuruza. Rwemeje rero ko kuba aburana yemera icyaha no kuba ari ubwa mbere
akoze icyaha bizwi, nta cyabuza ko yakongera kugabanyirizwa igihano ku buryo buhagije,
rushingiye ku ngingo ya 60 y’Itegeko nº 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/8/2018 riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano
muri rusange, nk’uko yahinduwe n’iya 25 (a) y’Itegeko nº 059/2023 ryo ku wa 4/12/2023,
rumuhanisha igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15), rwemeza kandi ko nta gihano
cy’ihazabu ahanishijwe kuko no ku rwego rubanza, ntacyo yahawe kandi Ubushinjacyaha bukaba
butarabijyuririye.
[17] Nk’uko bigaragara Mukandamage Immaculée abazwa mu Bugenzacyaha ku wa 21/2/2022,
yasobanuye ko umuhungu we witwa Munyentwari François yaje kumusura amuzanira
udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi ngo arucuruze azabonemo amafaranga yo guhemba umukozi
uzamuterera ibishyimbo, ahita abona abakiriya barimo n’uwitwa Rasta amugurishaho tubiri (2)
n’undi mugabo atibuka. Yasobanuye kandi ko uwo muhungu we amuha utwo dupfunyika yari azi
neza ko ari urumogi yamuzaniye, uretse ko atari azi ko kurucuruza ari icyaha kubera ko atavaga
mu rugo, ahubwo abaruguraga bamusangaga mu rugo, ko kandi yatangiye kurucuruza guhera ku
wa 15/2/2022.
[18] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga mu bujurire bwa kabiri, Mukandamage Immaculée avuga
ko yagombaga guhamwa n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa urumogi kuko atigeze arucuruza, ahubwo
yarufatanywe ari urwe rwo kunya, nk’uko n’ingano y’udupfunyika 3 yafatanywe ibigaragaraza,
nyamara nk’uko bigaragara mu duce tubanziriza, yasobanuye mu buryo bwumvikana mu
magambo ye bwite igihe yatangiriye gucuruza urumogi, uko n’uko yarucuruzaga, ndetse na
bamwe mu bakiriya yarugurishijeho, bityo rero kuba kuri uru rwego abihakana ashingiye ku kuba
yarafatanywe ingano ntoya y’urumogi, nyamara bigaragara neza ko ari urwo yari yasigaranye
kurwo yari asanzwe acuruza bikaba ataribyo byerekana cyangwa bihamya ko ari urwo yinyweraga
nk’uko abivuga ubu, bivuze ko ibikorwa yemeye kuva mu ntangiriro bishimangira ko nta makosa
Urukiko Rukuru rwakoze rumuhamya kandi rumuhanira icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi, n’ubwo
mu bujurire nta kindi yanengaga uretse gusaba kugabanyirizwa igihano gusa.
[19] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga hagendewe rero ku bikorwa Mukandamage Immaculée
yakoze kandi yemeye, icyaha kigomba gukomeza kumuhama ari icyo gucuruza urumogi,
byumvikanisha ko impamvu ye y’ubujurire kuri iyi ngingo nta shingiro ifite.
‘’ Le juge d’appel et le (……) procèdent également de la même manière. Car ni l’un ni l’autre n’est lié par la
qualification du premier juge. Ils doivent à leur tour examiner l’exactitude de la première qualification’’, Général
Likulia Bolongo, op.cit., P.21.
5 Iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano cy’igifungo cya
burundu ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, naho ihazabu ikaba ishobora kugabanywa kugeza
kuri ¼ y’ihazabu ntoya iteganywa n’itegeko”

2. Kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarakoze amakosa yo kudasubikira Mukandamage
Immaculée igihano kandi ashaje yaranasize abana mu rugo birera
[20] Mukandamage Immaculée avuga ko anenga Urukiko Rukuru kuba rutaramusubikiye
igihano kandi yararugaragarije ko ashaje, ndetse akaba yarasize abana mu rugo birera, asaba uru
Rukiko gukosora ayo makosa.
[21] Ubushinjacyaha bwasabye ko urubanza rwajuririwe rugumana agaciro mu ngingo zarwo
zose.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
[22] Impaka kuri iki kibazo zishingiye ku kumenya niba Urukiko Rukuru rwarakoze amakosa
yo kudasubukira Mukandamage Immaculée igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15 rwamuhanishije.
[23] Nk’uko byemejwe mu rubanza n° RPA 00060/2021/CA rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
ku wa 4/4/2022, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Nsabimana Callixte bakunze kwita Sankara na
bagenzi be, isubikagihano rishingira ku gihano cy’igifungo kitarengeje imyaka itanu (5) cyemejwe
n’Urukiko.
[24] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga nk’uko byagarutsweho mu gace ka 16 k’uru rubanza
bigaragara ko Mukandamage Immaculée yahanishijwe igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, ibyo
rero birebewe hamwe n’umurongo uru Rukiko rwatanze ugaragara mu gace kabanziriza aka,
byumvikanisha ko ibyo asaba byo gusubikirwa igihano bidashoboka kuko icyo yahawe kirengeje
igifungo cy’imyaka itanu (5), bityo iyi ngingo ye y’ubujurire nta shingiro ifite.
[25] Hashingiwe ku byagaragajwe haruguru byose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ubujurire
bwatanze na Mukandamage Immaculée nta shingiro bufite.
III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[26] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Mukandamage Immaculée nta shingiro bufite;
[27] Rwemeje ko nta gihindutse ku mikirize y’urubanza n° RPA 00619/2022/HC/RWG
rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, Urugereko rwa Rwamagana ku wa 15/5/2025.
[28] Rwemeje ko igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15) yahanishijwe kigumyeho;
[29] Rutegetse ko amagarama y'urubanza aherera ku Isanduku ya Leta.
